title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Inorbit Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
